customer_name.description: Name of the customer reporting the complaint

contact_number.description: Phone number or email address of the customer

product_or_service.description: The specific product, device, model, or service the complaint is about

complaint_description.description: A detailed summary of the core issue reported by the customer

incident_date.description: The date or time when the incident occurred, if mentioned

sentiment.description: The emotional state of the customer during the complaint

severity.description: The operational or functional severity of the reported issue

priority.description: Urgency classification. P0 is critical/emergency, P3 is low priority

resolution_plan.description: A list of actionable steps for operations to resolve the complaint

customer_response.description: A polite, spoken-style response script to read back to the customer
